class.name: cynlr_robot/CynlrRobotInterface
class.description: ros2_control hardware interface for CynLR robot arms. Wraps cynlr_arm_core's ArmInterface, supporting Flexiv Rizon 7-DOF arms and the SimArm mock backend. Exposes position, velocity, effort, Cartesian, FT sensor, TCP pose, and GPIO interfaces. Vendor, connection, and tool parameters are read from URDF hardware params.
